lines.speaker: Sawmill operator
lines.text: Hello there. Do you want me to make some planks for you? I can make planks from wood, oak, teak and mahogany logs. Or would you like to buy some other housing supplies?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yes, please make me some planks.

lines.speaker: Sawmill operator
lines.text: You'll need to bring me some more logs.

lines.speaker: Sawmill operator
lines.text: Those planks cost [X] coins. You don't have enough money for all of them.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can I buy some housing supplies?

lines.speaker: Sawmill operator
lines.text: Well come back when you want some. You'll struggle to find quality planks anywhere but here!
